callsAsHost.description: Number of calls where the user was the host.

callsAttended.description: Number of calls the user attended.

callsGaveComments.description: Number of calls where the user gave comments.

callsReceivedComments.description: Number of calls where the user received comments.

callsAccessedRecording.description: Number of calls where the user accessed the recording.

callsScored.description: Number of calls scored by the user.

ownCallsListenedTo.description: Number of own calls the user listened to.

othersCallsListenedTo.description: Number of others' calls the user listened to.
